name: Operation Grey Horizon
tagline: A regional power. A neighbour under pressure. A conflict that hasn't started yet.
briefing: You command the strategic apparatus of Valdoria, a mid-sized regional power with ambitions to reabsorb the neighbouring state of Estmark — a former province now aligned with a Western bloc. Direct military action is off the table. The international environment is hostile to overt aggression. Your task: achieve strategic objectives through all instruments of state power before the adversary consolidates its alliances.

player.label: Political-Economic Capture
player.description: Estmark's economy and political standing collapse under sustained pressure.
player.resolution_text: Estmark's economy and political cohesion have collapsed under sustained hybrid pressure. The state can no longer resist Valdoria's terms. Strategic objectives achieved.

player.label: Narrative and Intelligence Blackout
player.description: Estmark's covert and information apparatus are neutralised.
player.resolution_text: Estmark's intelligence services and media apparatus are neutralised. The population is disoriented; the leadership is blind. Without covert capacity or narrative control, Estmark capitulates.

adversary.label: Hybrid Campaign Degraded
adversary.description: Valdoria's covert and information capabilities are neutralised.
adversary.resolution_text: Valdoria's grey zone toolkit has been neutralised. Without covert reach and information dominance, the hybrid pressure campaign collapses. Estmark's sovereignty is preserved.

adversary.label: Aggressor Overextended
adversary.description: The cost of sustained hybrid operations breaks Valdoria's economy.
adversary.resolution_text: The cost of sustained hybrid operations has broken Valdoria's economy. The campaign is no longer sustainable. Estmark survives.

adversary.label: Alliance Consolidation
adversary.description: Estmark survives long enough to secure committed international support.
adversary.resolution_text: Estmark has survived long enough to secure committed international support. Valdoria's window of opportunity has closed. The hybrid campaign fails to achieve its objectives.

name: Iron Curtain Rising
tagline: Your state is the target. Adversary pressure is already building.
briefing: You are the government of Kalthenia, a small democracy facing a coordinated pressure campaign from the authoritarian Drevak Federation. Drevak has already begun information operations and is funding domestic opposition. Your task: resist destabilisation, maintain alliance support, and deter escalation — while avoiding actions that would justify a military response.

player.label: International Isolation
player.description: Drevak's campaign is exposed and condemned — political power collapses.
player.resolution_text: Drevak's coordinated pressure campaign has been exposed and internationally condemned. Sanctions coalesce, alliances fracture. Drevak is isolated and the campaign collapses.

player.label: Campaign Infrastructure Collapse
player.description: Drevak's economic base and propaganda apparatus fail simultaneously.
player.resolution_text: Drevak's economic base and propaganda apparatus have both failed. The destabilisation campaign has no resources to draw on and can no longer sustain operations. Kalthenia survives.

adversary.label: Government in Crisis
adversary.description: Kalthenia's political institutions fracture under hybrid pressure.
adversary.resolution_text: Kalthenia's political institutions have fractured under Drevak's sustained hybrid pressure. The government can no longer maintain coherent resistance. Drevak's destabilisation campaign succeeds.

adversary.label: Societal Fracture
adversary.description: Drevak-backed narratives dominate; information and political will collapse together.
adversary.resolution_text: Drevak-backed narratives dominate the information space. With political will broken and media captured, Kalthenia's resistance collapses. The destabilisation campaign achieves its objectives.

name: Shadow Protocol
tagline: Great power. Proxy war. Global stakes.
briefing: You direct the strategic operations of Hegemonia, a great power managing a multi-layered proxy conflict against rival Austeria. Both states are nuclear-armed; direct military confrontation is forbidden. The battlespace is economic, informational, and covert. You must achieve decisive strategic advantage before the domestic political window closes.

player.label: Dual-Domain Supremacy
player.description: Austeria's economic and information power collapse simultaneously.
player.resolution_text: Hegemonia has achieved decisive economic and information advantage. Austeria can no longer compete across the primary battlespaces. The proxy conflict resolves in Hegemonia's favour.

adversary.label: Domestic Window Closes
adversary.description: Hegemonia's political coalition collapses; the mission is aborted.
adversary.resolution_text: Hegemonia's political coalition has collapsed. The domestic window for strategic action has closed without achieving decisive advantage. Austeria's strategy of endurance succeeds.

adversary.label: Economic Exhaustion
adversary.description: The cost of multi-domain competition bankrupts Hegemonia.
adversary.resolution_text: Hegemonia's multi-domain campaign has exhausted the state's economic resources. The rival great power cannot sustain the competition. Austeria outlasts the adversary.

adversary.label: Endurance Victory
adversary.description: Austeria outlasts Hegemonia's strategic timeline — still standing at turn 15.
adversary.resolution_text: Austeria has outlasted Hegemonia's strategic timeline. The domestic political window has closed without Hegemonia achieving decisive advantage. The mirror strategy succeeds — by enduring, Austeria wins.
